title: calophyllum enervosum
intro: Calophyllum enervosum, also known as the Green Forest or Green Forest tree, is a species of plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its oil, which has been traditionally used to treat a variety of health issues, including skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory problems. The oil from Calophyllum enervosum is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, making it beneficial for wound healing, skin rejuvenation, and reducing inflammation. Calophyllum enervosum oil can be used in herbal preparations such as topical creams, salves, and ointments, as well as in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and well-being.
